overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair walking through a neon-lit covered queue line in a futuristic urban setting, approaching a venue entrance guarded by a muscular bouncer. The scene features vibrant cyan and purple neon lighting against dark cyberpunk architecture.

woman in green crop top and blue jeans walking in the queue

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered outdoor queue line marked by red velvet ropes. Neon billboards and futuristic skyscrapers are visible in the background. Various NPCs stand in line or lean against barriers as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-section of queue approaching the venue entrance

events.description: camera navigates closely past the zebra-print woman in the queue

agents.ego_description: continuing through the queue, navigating past standing NPCs

notable_agents.action: woman in zebra-print top holding an orange drink
person in purple suit with green hair standing with hands on hips

entered.detail: dark metal wall with security door at the end of the walkway
large white sliding door with black geometric frame

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the middle section of the queue, passing a woman in a zebra-print top and a person in a purple suit. The background cityscape gives way to the venue entrance wall as the covered walkway continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: venue entrance lobby with security checkpoint

events.description: view temporarily blocked by person in black and pink textured outfit passing close to camera
transitions from open covered walkway to enclosed entrance area with security door

agents.ego_description: approaching the bouncer guarding the entrance door

notable_agents.action: muscular bouncer in red tank top holding a purple device, guarding the door

entered.detail: bright rectangular ceiling light panels illuminating the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the venue entrance, passing close by a person in a distinctive outfit. The scene becomes more enclosed with artificial lighting. A muscular bouncer in a red tank top stands guard at a large white security door as the camera moves in for a close approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit outdoor queue that gradually narrows into a confined venue entrance. It begins by tracking the character past red velvet ropes and waiting NPCs, with towering futuristic skyscrapers and glowing billboards dominating the background. As the camera moves forward, the open cityscape begins to recede, replaced by the solid walls of the venue as the character passes a woman in a zebra-print top and a person in a purple suit. The scene then becomes more enclosed under artificial lighting, shifting from the broad walkway toward a restricted security point. Finally, the camera closes in on a muscular bouncer in a red tank top guarding a large white security door.
